Un hogar para cada patita, una voz para: A home for every paw, a voice for every animal
PatitasUnidas es el punto de encuentro s: PatitasUnidas is the safe meeting point between people, shelters and organisations. Adopt, search for lost animals and support those who need it most.
Tres sencillos pasos para ayudar o encon: Three simple steps to help or find your ideal companion
Crea tu perfil verificado con DNI/NIE y: Create your verified profile with your ID and phone number. Our system prevents fake profiles and protects animals from fraudulent adoptions.
Crea publicaciones en las secciones de a: Create posts in the adoption, lost animals or support sections. Use filters by location, species and more to find exactly what you are looking for.

Todo lo que necesitas saber sobre Patita: Everything you need to know about PatitasUnidas
faq_intro_desc: We are a platform created by and for animal lovers. Our goal is to centralize adoption, the search for lost animals and help for the most vulnerable, in a safe and accessible way for everyone.
¿Qué puedes hacer en PatitasUnidas?: What can you do on PatitasUnidas?
faq_adoptar_desc: Find your ideal companion among hundreds of animals waiting for a home. Filter by species, breed, age and location.
faq_buscar_desc: Have you lost or had your pet stolen? Post a notice and rally the entire community to find them.
faq_apoyar_desc: Donate, volunteer or help cover veterinary costs for stray animals and shelters.
don_hero_desc: With your contribution we help cover veterinary costs, food and platform maintenance so that more animals can find a home.
don_success_msg: Your contribution of :amount € has been successfully registered. ❤️
don_vet_desc: Operations, vaccines and treatments for rescued animals.
don_food_desc: Food and supplies for colonies and shelters with no resources.
don_platform_desc: Servers and development to keep PatitasUnidas growing.
don_empty_global: No donations have been registered yet.
don_empty_mine: You have not made any donations yet.

faq_q1: Is it free to register on PatitasUnidas?
faq_a1: Yes, registration is completely free. We ask for an ID number and phone to ensure the safety of all users and prevent fake profiles or adoption fraud.
faq_q2: How can I post an animal for adoption?
faq_a2: Once your profile is registered and verified, go to the 'Main' section, choose 'Adopt a pet' and click the 'Publish' button. You can add photos, a description, location and animal details.
faq_q3: What do I do if I find my lost pet?
faq_a3: Update your post to indicate it has been found so the community knows it is safe. You can also contact the administrators to close the case.
faq_q4: How do I know if a shelter is verified?
faq_a4: Shelter and organisation profiles go through an additional verification process. You will see a verification badge on their profile. We always recommend visiting the facilities before an adoption.
faq_q5: Can I make donations through the platform?
faq_a5: We are currently integrating a secure donation system via payment gateway. Very soon you will be able to donate directly to shelters and causes from the platform.
faq_q6: Is it possible to report inappropriate content?
faq_a6: Yes. Every post, comment and profile has a report button. Our team reviews all reports within 24 hours. The rating system also helps identify trusted users.

Al registrarte en PatitasUnidas aceptas: By registering on PatitasUnidas you fully accept these terms. If you disagree with any part, we ask that you do not use the platform.
PatitasUnidas es una plataforma de ayuda: PatitasUnidas is an animal welfare platform. Publishing false, misleading or unauthorised commercial content is strictly prohibited. Violations may result in account suspension.
Los datos proporcionados durante el regi: The information provided during registration must be truthful. PatitasUnidas reserves the right to verify user identity to ensure animal safety.
Tus datos personales serán tratados conf: Your personal data will be processed in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR). We will not share your information with third parties without your express consent.
Eres responsable del contenido que publi: You are responsible for the content you publish. PatitasUnidas may remove any post that violates these rules or endangers animal welfare.
PatitasUnidas actúa como intermediario y: PatitasUnidas acts as an intermediary and is not responsible for the final outcome of adoption processes. We always recommend following the protocols established by animal shelters.
PatitasUnidas se reserva el derecho de m: PatitasUnidas reserves the right to modify these terms at any time. Users will be notified of significant changes through the platform.
Para cualquier consulta relacionada con: For any enquiry related to these terms you can contact us at
